item.title: Cute/Funny videos for your collection, take as many as you like!

My gift to you my friend. Hope everything goes well in your day
And that you can add many videos to your collection
Check your wifi
Eat veggies
I Love you.

item.title: Today was weird, so here's nature being awesome to make it better

Alberta Edit: Crowfoot Glacier sitting above Bow Lake, to be exact! Thanks to @thorinc for the ID and to @AStrayCowLivesHere for the streetview: https://imgur.com/gallery/DNr4Exy/comment/2455060071
Corvo Island, Portugal
Factory Butte, Wayne County, Utah
Morning Glory Pool, Yellowstone National Park
Reynisfjara black sand beach, Iceland
Dolomites, Italy
Reynisfjara black sand beach, Iceland (again)

item.title: A Positive Trans Story
item.description: I feel like we hear about so many horrific experiences when people come out, I thought it would be nice to share a positive one. My wife of almost eleven years has known I was a crossdresser from the start of our relationship. I've been burned before after I already got connected and wanted that out on the table in case our relationship went anywhere. A few years ago, I drunkenly came to the realization that I was trans and not a crossdresser. She has been nothing but supportive of me the entire time I've been with her. And that realization didn't change anything. I work in an extremely conservative field and to double down, a conservative small town. It's not unusual to see tRump flags flying, even now. I slowly came out to coworkers. I started with ones I suspected would be okay with it and moved to ones I was unsure about. I received a ton of support, especially from the women I work with. The most negative encounter I had was with someone who is outspokenly conservative. He told me he doesn't "agree with a lot of the trans stuff" but recognized that it doesn't impact him at all and still wanted to be friends. He also understood that my personality and traits that make me, me wasn't changing. I recognize the "youre not like those other trans people" thought isn't the best, but it wasn't outright hatred either. And hopefully I can start to change his mind about everyone as a whole. Last week I came out to my two supervisors. They kept it professional and just told me to let them know what I needed when I needed it. The response was immediate and if they were thinking other things, they didn't let it show on their face or speech. It hasn't been awkward since and it's business as usual. Best case scenario. Today I took the hardest step (in my mind) and told my parents. I called my aunt yesterday and told her first, just get her gauge on how this would go. She was supportive but was unsure about my dad. She didn't think he would be outright hostile, but warned me he may not be immediately accepting either. I called and we chatted about normal things, then I dropped the bomb. There was a little shock, but they immediately said they still loved me and cared about me. I was balling my eyes out from the relief and the stress lifting. Thankfully my wife was there to continue the conversation. I got a text from my dad a little after the phone call ended saying, "I understand how difficult it must have been to tell us about your transition. Just know we support and love you." Hit me right in the feels and I cried again. I recognize I am extremely lucky to have the support that I do. I fully understand not every has it or is even in a spot where its safe to do so. I just wanted to put some positive energy out there for people on the fence about coming out. Good stories happen just as often as the bad ones.
item.dc:creator: ClassyPirating

item.title: Grau 51 is gone. Ukraine did it again. One of the largest ammo depots in russia exploded completely. 5kms radius evacuated because of falling debris.
item.description:
It explodes since yesterday and refuses to stop doing so.
This it was before Ukraine hit it.
Another impression.
It's noth east of Moskow, so Ukraine just shot over the town ... nice "Hey guys, nite to see you, will reach out to you later.
That's what it did the whole night.
And there are many more clips on the net about it. Oh and, it's still exploding. Slava Ukraini!
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Workout gear

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
guess i feel up for posting again? going to dive into more satisfactory cause must build and do all of the things. hope everyone has a fantastic day!
is there a main quest? did i miss that?
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! I am trying to get back into more gaming in my discord! all are welcome to join in and hang out. please do be respectful tho if we need coms for the games things. usually just hop in vc and once people start showing up we decide on what to play... been a lot of helldivers 2 recently... and satisfactory fun. So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Tesla only profitable in Q1 due to regulatory credits
item.description: Musk starting the earnings call with a ridiculous rant about government handouts not only shows his hypocrisy and projection on this matter, but his detachment from reality itself. He is, truly, too stuck in the impenetrable echo chamber of his self-congratulating twitter feed to realize what an embarrassment he’s being in public – to the point of inventing shadow enemies to explain the very real, very simple explanation that people aren’t buying his company’s cars Per today’s earnings report, Tesla earned $595 million in regulatory credits in Q1. But its total net income for the quarter was $409 million. This means that without those regulatory credits, Tesla would have posted a -$189 million loss in Q1. It was saved not just by credit sales, but credit sales which increased year over year – in the year-ago quarter, Tesla made $442 million in regulatory credits, despite having higher sales in Q1 2024 than in Q1 2025. So not only were credits higher, but credits per vehicle were higher. Plus, these opponents didn’t extend the same treatment to the oil industry, which is subsidized to the tune of $760 billion per year in the US alone in unpriced externalities, yet that is somehow never mentioned during their earnings calls. Musk is heading up the self-styled “Department of Government Efficiency,” Musk originally claimed that the department would be able to save $2 trillion for the US government, which is actually impossible because federal discretionary spending is $1.7 trillion, which is a (gets out abacus) smaller number than $2 trillion. He has, of course, failed at this task that anyone with any level of competence would have known was impossible before setting it out for themselves, and now projects that the department will save $150 billion next year, less than a tenth of his original estimate. But even that projection is likely an overstatement, given that most of the supposed savings that DOGE has found are not actual savings at all. On top of this, the US government’s deficit has grown to the second-highest level on record – with the first happening in 2020, the last time Mr. Trump squatted in the White House. Which means the government isn’t saving money, it is in fact borrowing and spending more of it than ever before. So, Musk’s tenure in the advisory board has been an unmitigated failure by any realistic account. https://electrek.co/2025/04/22/musk-complains-about-handouts-when-tesla-was-only-profitable-due-to-credits/
item.dc:creator: DuraAce9sp
